insights.title: RL-ALNS improves stability
insights.detail: RL-ALNS achieves near-zero variance in NV across most instances

insights.title: DQN alone fails
insights.detail: Pure DQN produces 150%–400% worse total distance

insights.title: ALNS remains strong baseline
insights.detail: ALNS consistently achieves near-optimal solutions with lower runtime

insights.title: RL adds consistency, not large improvement
insights.detail: RL-ALNS slightly improves or matches ALNS but mainly reduces variance

conclusion.key_takeaway: RL is useful for guiding ALNS but not as a standalone solver
conclusion.research_claim: Hybrid RL-ALNS improves robustness rather than raw performance
